bugs.root_cause: Code path had no error handling — exceptions would propagate uncaught

bugs.error_message: App not working after antigravity edits; Quick Match button does nothing. Console: Refused to execute script .../_next/static/... MIME text/html, 404 on all chunks
bugs.root_cause: apps/web/.next deleted while next-server still running; server served 404/HTML for every static chunk so React never hydrated and all buttons were dead. Source edits were fine (typecheck clean).
bugs.fix: Killed stale next-server, restarted pnpm dev (web) to rebuild .next. Verified Quick Match creates computer game vs Stockfish (Level 4), engine played 1.Nf3.

bugs.root_cause: Property access on potentially null/undefined value
bugs.fix: Added null safety (optional chaining or null check)
